title: 工具执行失败: read_file
content:
--- 文件: core/memory_layers.py (第 175 至 360 行，共 648 行) ---
 175 |     def __init__(self, storage_dir: str = "memory/long_term"):
 176 |         """
 177 |         初始化长期记忆
 178 | 
 179 |         Args:
 180 |             storage_dir: 存储目录路径
 181 |         """
 182 |         self.storage_dir = Path(storage_dir)
 183 |         self.storage_dir.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
 184 | 
 185 |         # 内存索引：{session_id: file_path}
 186 |         self.index: Dict[str, Path] = {}
 187 | 
 188 |         # MemoryItem 索引：{memory_item_id: file_path}
 189 |         self.item_index: Dict[str, Path] = {}
 190 | 
 191 |         # 倒排索引：{keyword: [session_ids]}
 192 |         self.inverted_index: Dict[str, List[str]] = {}
 193 | 
 194 |         # MemoryItem 倒排索引：{keyword: [memory_item_ids]}
 195 |         self.item_inverted_index: Dict[str, List[str]] = {}
 196 | 
 197 |         # 初始化时加载索引
 198 |         self._load_index()
 199 | 
 200 |     def _load_index(self):
 201 |         """从磁盘加载索引"""
 202 |         index_file = self.storage_dir / "index.json"
 203 |         if index_file.exists():
 204 |             try:
 205 |                 with open(index_file, 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:
 206 |                     data = json.load(f)
 207 |                     self.index = {k: Path(v) for k, v in data.get("index", {}).items()}
 208 |                     self.item_index = {k: Path(v) for k, v in data.get("item_index", {}).items()}
 209 |                     self.inverted_index = data.get("inverted_index", {})
 210 |                     self.item_inverted_index = data.get("item_inverted_index", {})
 211 |             except Exception as e:
 212 |                 # 如果加载失败，重建索引
 213 |                 backup_path = self._backup_corrupt_index(index_file)
 214 |                 backup_hint = f"，已备份损坏索引到: {backup_path}" if backup_path else ""
 215 |                 print(f"⚠️ 加载索引失败，将重建索引: {e}{backup_hint}")
 216 |                 self._rebuild_index()
 217 | 
 218 |     def _backup_corrupt_index(self, index_file: Path) -> str:
 219 |         """备份无法解析的索引文件，避免重建时直接覆盖现场。"""
 220 |         if not index_file.exists():
 221 |             return ""
 222 | 
 223 |         timestamp = datetime.now().strftime("%Y%m%d_%H%M%S_%f")
 224 |         backup_path = index_file.with_name(f"{index_file.name}.corrupt_{timestamp}.bak")
 225 |         try:
 226 |             index_file.replace(backup_path)
 227 |             return str(backup_path)
 228 |         except Exception as backup_error:
 229 |             print(f"⚠️ 备份损坏索引失败: {backup_error}")
 230 |             return ""
 231 | 
 232 |     def _serialize_index(self) -> Dict[str, Any]:
 233 |         """把内存索引转换为可持久化 JSON 的普通字典。"""
 234 |         return {
 235 |             "index": {k: str(v) for k, v in self.index.items()},
 236 |             "item_index": {k: str(v) for k, v in self.item_index.items()},
 237 |             "inverted_index": self.inverted_index,
 238 |             "item_inverted_index": self.item_inverted_index,
 239 |         }
 240 | 
 241 |     def _save_index(self):
 242 |         """保存索引到磁盘。
 243 | 
 244 |         Windows 下 os.replace 在目标文件被杀毒软件、编辑器、同步盘或另一个
 245 |         Python 进程短暂占用时可能抛 PermissionError(WinError 5)。索引只是缓存，
 246 |         单次保存失败不应影响启动/工具调用，因此这里采用：
 247 |         1. 内容未变化时跳过写入，降低启动期无意义 replace；
 248 |         2. PermissionError 短暂重试；
 249 |         3. 仍失败时保留一个 fallback 快照并清理临时文件，避免刷屏和 tmp 堆积。
 250 |         """
 251 |         index_file = self.storage_dir / "index.json"
 252 |         payload = self._serialize_index()
 253 | 
 254 |         try:
 255 |             serialized = json.dumps(payload, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2)
 256 |             if index_file.exists():
 257 |                 try:
 258 |                     if index_file.read_text(encoding='utf-8') == serialized:
 259 |                         return
 260 |                 except OSError:
 261 |                     # 读旧索引失败时继续尝试写入；写入失败会走下面的降级逻辑。
 262 |                     pass
 263 | 
 264 |             fd, tmp_n...
